allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\(''zod''\); console.log\(z.ZodError ? ''v3'' : ''v4''\); const r = z.number\(\).safeParse\(''x''\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(r.error\)\)\)")
